footer.tagline: VIZA helps you plan, apply, and track visas seamlessly across the world.

home.title: VIZA — Visa applications, handled.
home.description: Browse visa options for any destination. Your VIZA consultant and our AI handle the paperwork — you book the trip.
home.heroLede: Browse visa options for any destination. Your VIZA consultant and our AI handle the paperwork — you book the trip.

apply.title: Apply — VIZA
apply.description: Upload your passport. We auto-extract details. Confirm, check out, and your visa is delivered to your inbox.

careers.title: Careers at VIZA
careers.description: Help us make borders disappear, one application at a time. Engineering, design, operations, and consulting roles in Singapore, San Francisco, Dubai, and London.

contact.title: Contact VIZA
contact.description: WhatsApp, WeChat, Phone, Email. Four channels, four desks, a real human within 5 minutes.

refunds.title: Refunds policy — VIZA
refunds.description: If we miss, you don't pay. Our service-fee refund policy, the matrix, and how to file a claim.

security.title: Security at VIZA
security.description: Private. Transparent. Secure by default. How we protect customer data, our vulnerability disclosure program, and safe harbour.

status.title: System status — VIZA
status.description: Real-time status of VIZA and the government visa portals we file against.

visa.step1: Tell us your trip details and upload your passport.
visa.step2: We complete and check your application against the latest rules.
visa.step3: We submit to the government portal and track the decision.
visa.step4: Your approved visa arrives by email — we monitor it end to end.
visa.doc1: A passport valid for at least 6 months.
visa.doc4: A payment method for the agency + government fee.
visa.comingSoonBody: We're putting the finishing touches on {country}. Create an account and we'll let you know the moment it's live.
visa.nearbySub: Travelling the region? Add another visa to your trip — your VIZA consultant batches them.
visa.editorial: This page follows VIZA’s editorial policy. We rely on official government sources and update each requirement when policy changes.
